Security, Systems, Product

Aryan Bhandari

Final-year Computer Science & Entrepreneurship student at Ashoka University building secure systems and privacy-focused products. I specialize in product development, cybersecurity GRC, and product security architecture.

Security Projects

Projects at the intersection of security and governance

Explore all projects →

Censorship Detector (India)

Network-level measurement system detecting DNS tampering, HTTP interference, and regional filtering patterns using distributed probes and anomaly correlation.

Network MeasurementCensorshipDNS/HTTP/TLSPythonPolicy

GRC Automation Tool

Automated compliance workflow mapping security controls to ISO 27001/SOC 2 requirements with risk scoring, evidence tracking, and dashboard reporting.

GRCComplianceRisk AssessmentAutomation

ML-Based DDoS Intrusion Detection System

Supervised machine learning model classifying DDoS traffic using flow-level features and anomaly detection to reduce false positives in real-time network monitoring.

Machine LearningIntrusion DetectionNetwork SecurityPython
